channel.title: Braelyn's Blog
channel.description: A personal blog exploring technology, creativity, and the art of building meaningful things.

item.title: SF's lack of style: a forcing function
item.description: How San Francisco's lack of fashion culture became a forcing function for authentic self-expression and identity.

item.title: The Making of Braelyn.ai
item.description: How a crisis of identity, a trip to Berlin, and the discovery of Berghain inspired the design of braelyn.ai.

item.title: Lessons I've Learned As a Young, Startup Founder
item.description: Reflections on founding two startups before age 22 — on age, passion, pivoting, hard work, and learning from failure.

item.title: Why isn't AI the buzzword that it used to be?
item.description: Exploring why AI has shifted from being the ultimate buzzword to a more pragmatic tool in the tech industry.
